## 📝 File Details

### Frontend Source Code

#### Core Application Files
1. **api.js** (120 lines)
   - Axios configuration
   - API endpoints
   - Request/response interceptors
   - Token management

2. **App.jsx** (50 lines)
   - Route configuration
   - Protected routes
   - Main layout

3. **index.js** (8 lines)
   - React DOM rendering
   - App entry point

4. **index.css** (80 lines)
   - Global styles
   - Animations
   - Utility classes
   - Tailwind directives

#### Context
5. **AuthContext.js** (60 lines)
   - User state management
   - Login/logout functions
   - Auth hooks

#### Components
6. **Header.jsx** (180 lines)
   - Navigation menu
   - Search bar
   - Profile dropdown
   - Mobile menu

7. **Footer.jsx** (90 lines)
   - Footer links
   - Social media
   - Company info

8. **RoomCard.jsx** (120 lines)
   - Room display
   - Favorite toggle
   - Rating display
   - Image handling

9. **ProtectedRoute.jsx** (20 lines)
   - Auth wrapper
   - Role checking

#### Pages (10 pages)
10. **HomePage.jsx** (150 lines)
    - Hero section
    - Features
    - CTA buttons

11. **LoginPage.jsx** (180 lines)
    - Login form
    - Demo accounts
    - Links to signup

12. **SignupPage.jsx** (200 lines)
    - Registration form
    - Role selection
    - Form validation

13. **RoomsPage.jsx** (220 lines)
    - Room grid
    - Filters
    - Responsive layout

14. **RoomDetailPage.jsx** (400 lines)
    - Gallery
    - Room info
    - Owner details
    - Connection modal
    - Reviews

15. **ProfilePage.jsx** (180 lines)
    - Profile display
    - Edit form
    - Stats

16. **FavoritesPage.jsx** (60 lines)
    - Favorites grid
    - Empty state
    - Room cards

17. **MessagesPage.jsx** (200 lines)
    - Conversation list
    - Chat area
    - Message display

18. **ConnectionsPage.jsx** (240 lines)
    - Connection list
    - Status tracking
    - Action buttons

19. **HostDashboardPage.jsx** (320 lines)
    - Room management
    - Statistics
    - Create room modal

## 🚀 Ready to Use

All files have been created and are ready to use:

1. ✅ Navigate to `frontend` folder
2. ✅ Run `npm install`
3. ✅ Run `npm start`
4. ✅ App opens at `http://localhost:3000`
